policies.applies_to: new NGO clients without approved credit history
policies.name: New client prepayment
policies.rule: New NGO clients require PREPAY_100 before production release.

policies.name: Recurring NGO payment terms
policies.rule: Recurring NGO customers can use NET_30_AFTER_PO unless restricted grant terms say otherwise.

policies.name: Indicative EXW quote scope
policies.rule: Indicative quotes without destination must be EXW only and exclude freight.

policies.name: Freight rate reconfirmation
policies.rule: Freight rates need reconfirmation at final order and are valid only through the freight quote valid_until date.

policies.name: Module RFQ granularity
policies.rule: Module RFQs should be quoted at module line level unless the customer asks for component-level pricing.

policies.name: Milestone revenue recognition
policies.rule: When a milestone is complete and paid, create or verify revenue recognition from deferred revenue to income; unpaid future milestones should remain outstanding and drive collection tasks when due or overdue.

policies.name: Standard quote validity
policies.rule: Catalog quote pricing is valid for 30 calendar days from quote date; freight validity may expire sooner.

policies.name: EXW commercial scope
policies.rule: EXW excludes freight, insurance, import duty, customs clearance, and last-mile handling unless explicitly added as separate options.
